prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-DMB-POWDERULTRAVIOLET-KIT-ATAC Product Type: OFFICE_PRODUCTS Brand (from catalog): CCS Spy Gear Existing Title: Ultimate UV Theft Detection Spy Combo UV Pen Powder and LED Light Description: This Ultimate Ultraviolet Theft Detection Spy Combo is the perfect kit for keeping your valuables safe from thieves.

The UV pen is ideal for marking currency or personal property, writing covert "invisible" communications, taking sensitive notes, and much more. The markings will remain invisible until examined under an ultraviolet light source.

The super bright UV flashlight combines LED technology with the added value of ultraviolet detection. It features 9 incredibly bright ultraviolet LEDs and is designed to work with ultraviolet theft detection powder or ultraviolet pens.

Powered by three AAA batteries (included), this flashlight is a perfect item for your ultraviolet detection needs. It is 3.7" in length, making it very compact and easy to bring anywhere.

Ultraviolet Thief Detection Powder is designed for thief detection and the identification of stolen or altered items. For example, an article can be marked so that it is invisible to the eye, but under ultraviolet light the item and anyone who touched it can be identified. Powder, once touched, remains on fingers and hands, invisible except under UV light. Search Terms: Theft Detection Personal Security UV Powder Features: - UV Marker Pen Ink and UV Theft Powder is only visible and detectable by using the included UV Flashlight - All contents including UV Powder and UV Marker Pen are Non-toxic - Marker Pen and UV powder goes on clear- totally invisible to the naked eye! - UV Stain Dector Flashlight included | Operates on 3 AAA batteries (included) - Made in the USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
